title: Raccoon Removal South Bronx | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in South Bronx, Bronx. Licensed wildlife experts serving Mott Haven, Melrose & Hunts Point. 24/7 emergency service. Call now for safe, humane removal!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in South Bronx neighborhoods, finding shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces throughout Mott Haven, Melrose, and Hunts Point. These intelligent animals can cause serious structural damage and pose health risks to residents and families. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional, humane raccoon removal services tailored to the unique housing stock and urban environment of South Bronx.
whyUs: Our wildlife specialists have extensive experience serving South Bronx's diverse mix of pre-war apartment buildings, row houses, and multi-family dwellings. We offer rapid response times throughout the 10451, 10454, and 10455 zip codes, with bilingual technicians and competitive pricing that respects the community we serve.
localContext: South Bronx's proximity to the Harlem River waterfront, Bronx Kill, and green spaces like St. Mary's Park creates ideal raccoon habitats and travel corridors into residential areas. The neighborhood's older building stock, including historic brownstones near the Hub and century-old apartment buildings along Grand Concourse, often have entry points that raccoons exploit for nesting.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in South Bronx typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of animals, location of the nest, and necessary exclusion work. Simple single-raccoon removals start around $900, while extensive cases involving multiple animals, babies, or significant entry point repairs can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing for all South Bronx residents.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to my South Bronx home and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons pose multiple risks including rabies transmission, roundworm parasites in their feces, and aggressive behavior when cornered or protecting young. They cause structural damage by tearing insulation, chewing electrical wires, damaging roof vents, and creating entry holes. Their waste accumulation also creates serious health hazards and unpleasant odors that can permeate living spaces in multi-family buildings.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my South Bronx property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency raccoon removal services throughout South Bronx, including Mott Haven, Melrose, Hunts Point, and Longwood. Our technicians typically arrive within 2-4 hours for urgent situations. The complete removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on whether babies are present and the complexity of exclusion work needed to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: What raccoon removal methods do you use in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: We use humane, effective methods including live trapping, one-way exclusion doors, and hands-on removal when safe. After removing all raccoons, we seal entry points with heavy-duty materials suited to South Bronx's building types, install chimney caps, repair roof damage, and provide attic cleanup and decontamination services. All our methods comply with New York State wildlife regulations and prioritize the safety of your family and neighbors.
